positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a serene woodland creature, such as a fox or owl, peeking out from stylized foliage. The composition should be centered, featuring bold, clean black lines against a clean white or cream background. Use a repeating pattern style, ensuring high contrast and negative space are utilized effectively. The style must be sophisticated, modern, and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on smooth curves, geometric elements within organic shapes, and perfect symmetry in the linework. Concept: 'Quiet Adventure'.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy lines, jpeg artifacts, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, realistic photo, photorealistic
